2026-0477
2026-05-26ESDCPoverty Reduction ActReappointment of a part-time member of the National Advisory Council on PovertyReappointment of Hannah Christine Brais of Montréal, Quebec, as a part-time member of the National Advisory Council on Poverty, to hold office during pleasure for a term ending on September 30, 2029, effective November 11, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a part-time member of the National Advisory Council on Poverty
precis: Reappointment of Hannah Christine Brais of Montréal, Quebec, as a part-time member of the National Advisory Council on Poverty, to hold office during pleasure for a term ending on September 30, 2029, effective November 11, 2026.
